title: Great Lakes protection - Canada.ca
content:
## Great Lakes Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative

## Great Lakes Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative
Priorities, partnerships, programs and actions for protecting the waters of the Great Lakes through a Freshwater Action Plan.
- Millions Flow into Great Lakes: Canada funds $9.3 million in freshwater solutions
- Funding now open: Canada Water Agency invites applications to protect freshwater ecosystems nationwide
- Blue waters ahead: Federal funding for Halton and Hamilton-led freshwater solutions with over $700,000 investment in Lake Ontario

## Services and information

### Great Lakes overview
Targeting threats to Great Lakes water quality and ecosystem health.

### Great Lakes agreements
How we work together to restore and protect the Great Lakes.

### Funding for Great Lakes projects
Details on funding opportunities and how to apply.

### State of the Great Lakes
Assessment of the health of the Great Lakes using ecosystem indicators.
Actions to address threats to Great Lakes water quality and ecosystem health.
Projects funded under the Great Lakes Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative.
